# Uniswap CCA Application Worksheet

Status: PREPARED, NOT READY TO SUBMIT

This worksheet mirrors the current public Uniswap CCA evaluation form. It must not be submitted until PNET has public evidence for the LP gate and at least three of Uniswap's four identity/traction criteria.

Official form: https://share.hsforms.com/1AN-LREhwT3uK03oGKvOGvgs8pgg

## Form Fields

### Email

`[USER INPUT REQUIRED: domain-controlled project email preferred]`

Do not put a private email into this public repository. Enter it directly in the official form when submitting.

### Project X Profile

Candidate observed profile: `https://x.com/ProfitnetPNET`

Status: `[USER MUST CONFIRM PROJECT CONTROL]`

The live website currently links to a different, stale handle. Repair all public references before submission.

### Founder Identity Evidence

`[USER INPUT REQUIRED]`

Provide public links that show the founder's chosen public identity consistently, such as:

- official website founder/team page;
- LinkedIn profile;
- project X profile naming the founder;
- GitHub profile or public biography where appropriate.

Do not publish a home address, identification document, phone number, or other sensitive personal information.

### Qualifying Press

`[NOT CURRENTLY EVIDENCED]`

Uniswap currently names CoinList, Blockworks, Fortune, Decrypt, The Block, and The Defiant. Add only real editorial coverage links that feature the project.

### Qualifying Fund Evidence

`[NOT CURRENTLY EVIDENCED]`

Add only a fund portfolio page, official announcement, or equivalent public evidence from a fund included in Uniswap's published criteria. If the project relies on the other three criteria, do not imply funding; request form-field guidance from Uniswap if necessary.

### Logo Upload

Primary upload asset: `media/pnet-logo.jpg`

Compact token asset: `media/pnet-logo-32.svg`

Confirm the final file visually before upload.

## Final Pre-Submit Check

- [ ] Official X handle works and is consistent everywhere.
- [ ] Founder identity links are public and consistent.
- [ ] X follower threshold is honestly met.
- [ ] Qualifying press link exists.
- [ ] Qualifying fund link exists, or the project qualifies using the other three criteria and has obtained form-field guidance.
- [ ] Auction migration completed.
- [ ] LP threshold is proven with transaction evidence.
- [ ] Logo file is correct.
- [ ] Every form statement is accurate and source-linked.
- [ ] User has reviewed and authorized the external submission.
